0.details:
I am writing you this message to let you know that this too shall pass. Healing has no time frame. There will be days where you will question everything and everyone however with time it will all work out in the end. I was around and there when you tried your level best to make your relationship work. Nothing is wrong with you, IT IS HIS LOSE. The fact that he stopped communicating that is all on him. There is nothing wrong with how you loved him. You did that because he seemed to be also wanting a future with you. So do not feel bad that he is gone no explanation given. The only closure you need is that you did your best and he is a fool that he could not see how precious you were. Well all good things come to an end.
So now all you have to do is pick up the pieces and live again. Go back to the care free person you were. Always remember that a relationship does not define a person. You had a life before the relationship and you can still have a beautiful life without a man in your life. Never let a man or relationship define you. So baby girl pick up your crown.
0.model_generation: Hey, I want you to know this too shall pass. Healing has no time frame, and although some days you'll question everything and everyone, with time things will fall into place. I’ve seen how hard you tried to make this relationship work, and nothing is wrong with you—he is the one who lost something. His silence and lack of communication are on him, not you. You loved him because you believed in your future together, and there’s no shame in that. You deserve someone who recognizes how precious you are and sticks around. All you need for closure is knowing you gave it your all and he simply couldn’t appreciate your love. Now it’s time to pick up the pieces and live again. You had a life before this relationship, and you can rebuild it without a man defining you. So hold your head high and reclaim your crown.

All you need for closure is knowing you gave it your all and he simply couldn’t appreciate your love. Now it’s time to pick up the pieces and live again. You had a life before this relationship, and you can rebuild it without a man defining you. So hold your head high and reclaim your crown. I love you and may this message heal and encourage you to live again.

1.details: Hey friend. I am even scared to ask how you are doing. I am writing you this message to pass my Condolences about the passing of your brother. I am very sad in the way he passed. I hope you and the family can heal. I remember every time I would visit your home how your brother would make remarks about me being his future wife and you would always tell him that it would never again because he is not sure about his life and relationships. May you remember all the good times we had with your brother. May his soul rest in peace. Definitely gone but will be very hard to forget.
1.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I am so deeply sorry to hear about the passing of your brother. I can’t imagine the pain you and your family are feeling right now, but I want you to know I am here for you and holding you all in my thoughts. I was heartbroken when I learned of his sudden departure. I will always cherish the memories of visiting your home and hearing his playful remarks about me being his future wife—those moments of laughter and light will remain with me forever. May you find comfort in recalling the joy he brought to everyone around him and in the love you shared. Though he is gone, his spirit lives on through those memories. May his soul rest in peace, and may you and your family find strength and healing in the days ahead.

With love and sympathy,
Your friend
1.final_version:

2.details:
Dear Friend
I am writing this to apologize deeply about the issue of you having to find out from someone how I expressed my concern about how you went about to doing things. I am truly sorry I should have voiced my concerns with you from the very beginning. I hope you find a place in your heart to forgive me.
A regretful friend
2.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I am writing to apologize for the way you had to learn about my concerns from someone else rather than hearing them directly from me. I realize now that my reluctance to speak up created confusion and may have hurt your feelings. It was never my intention to undermine your choices or avoid honest conversation. I should have reached out sooner to share my thoughts with you face-to-face and offered my support. You deserve openness and respect, and I regret any frustration or disappointment my actions caused. Please know how much I value your trust and our friendship. I cherish the bond we share, and I hope this lapse won't overshadow the many good memories we've created together. Going forward, I promise to prioritize honest communication and to come to you first with anything on my mind. I hope you can forgive my mistake and allow us to move past this together.

A regretful friend

3.details:
Dear Friend
Thank you so much for always going above and beyond for me without asking. You have shown me that what a true friend is and for that I will cherish our bond forever and always. You are always willing to drop anything whenever you receive a call from me that does not go unnoticed. Thank you for being my personal cheerleader even when there were times I could not cheer for myself. You have been my rock from the very beginning.
A grateful friend
3.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

Thank you so much for always going above and beyond for me without being asked. You have shown me the true meaning of friendship, and I will cherish our bond forever and always. Whenever I call, you drop everything to help, and your unwavering support never goes unnoticed. You’ve been my personal cheerleader, lifting my spirits even on the days when I couldn’t find my own voice. You have celebrated my successes, comforted me in moments of doubt, and believed in me when I struggled to believe in myself.

From the very beginning, you have been my rock—steady, dependable, and kind. Your generosity of time and spirit reminds me how lucky I am to have you in my life. I look forward to many more adventures ahead, knowing you’ll be right there beside me. Your friendship is a gift I treasure every day, and I hope to repay your kindness in the same generous spirit.

With heartfelt gratitude,
A grateful friend

4.details: Dear Friend I am writing to catch up with you. I hope everything is going well on your side. Remember the farming business I always spoke about well, well, well friend I finally did it. And oh yes your dear friend is still very much scared of live chickens you should see me the minute a chicken looks my direction.
4.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I hope this letter finds you well and thriving. I’ve been eager to catch up and share some big news: I finally launched that farming venture I talked about endlessly. Working early mornings in the fields is rewarding, even if my fear of live chickens remains hilarious. Whenever a chicken peers my way, I’m ready to sprint!

The sunrise over the crops each day is breathtaking, and I’ve started keeping a journal of daily progress and weather patterns. Figuring out irrigation has been a puzzle, but I’m determined to get it right. There’s something deeply satisfying about planting a seed, tending it with care, and watching it grow.

How are things on your end? How’s work, and what new adventures have you been on lately? I miss our long chats and your unbeatable sense of humor. Let me know how you’re doing and when we can catch up in person.

Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

Your friend,
4.final_version:
Dear Friend

I am writing this message to catch up with you. I hope everything is going well on your side. Remember the farming business I always spoke about. Well friend I finally did it. Oh yes your friend is still very much scared of live chickens you should see the way I run the second a chicken looks my direction. Do not be a stranger now. Please do make time to visit so I can take you to the farm to show you my new babies. Love you loads.
 I always had to buy a bigger car so I can be able to buy food for my babies since we all know in order for babies to growing they need to be fed and taken good care of. I am really enjoying this new chapter of my life I wish I did not let fear win oh well at least I am doing what I love now.

5.details: Dear Husband of my dreams. What a man who is true to his words you are and I will forever be thankful to you for loving me when I could not even love myself.
5.model_generation: Husband of my dreams, from the moment you entered my life, your honesty, your gentle strength, and unwavering faith in me changed my world. When I struggled to love myself, your love became my anchor, guiding me back to joy and hope. Today I promise to cherish every word you speak, every dream you hold, and every moment we share. I vow to stand beside you in triumph and trial, to nurture our laughter and carry you in my heart through life’s ups and downs. I will encourage your aspirations, respect your truths, and honor the love that binds us. With you, I am whole, brave, and endlessly grateful. I give you my heart today and promise to share every tomorrow together, as your partner, your confidante, and your greatest advocate, now and always. I pledge to listen with compassion, to grow with you in kindness, and to build a life filled with adventure, warmth, and unwavering devotion.
5.final_version:
Dear Husband of my dreams
What a man who is true to his words you and I will forever be grateful that you came into my life when  I least expected. You were able to love me when I could not love myself. You restored so much in me by just being there. I still can not believe how you make loving me look so easy. YOU HAVE DONE SO MUCH FOR ME. You have healed a heart that you never broke. You have stood by me even when I could not stand myself. You taught me that love does not have any buts and what ifs. You taught me to never go to bed upset and you have taught me that one can show their point across without shouting. You were indeed made for me. Thank you for keeping the promise you made the first day you saw me that we will be the best of friends and for that I will worship the ground you walk on..
your wife
